name: Issue
description: Library component. Models a work-item bead's IssueStatus dimension. Verified state machine (per gastown-src/internal/beads/status.go:65-77 and the convoy-lands monolith): Open -> Hooked (on receive Sling from Feeder) -> InProgress (when assigned Polecat reaches Working) -> Closed (when Polecat reaches Done). Issue and Polecat observe each other -- cyclic observe. Issue advances via observed Polecat state; Polecat advances via observed Issue state. The cycle is well-defined because each transition has a unique guard combination. The Sling channel kicks off the cycle; from there both actors drive each other through their lifecycle.

SLING.description: receives a sling assignment from Feeder. Advances Open -> Hooked. Tagged 'Sling' to match the Feeder's send.

POLECAT_OBSERVE.description: observes the assigned polecat's state. Hooked -> InProgress fires when polecat = Working; InProgress -> Closed fires when polecat = Done.

actors.name: Issue
actors.owner: The bead's work-item status. Lifecycle verified against beads/status.go:65-77 and the convoy-lands monolith. Open -> Hooked is the slung-by-feeder write. Hooked -> InProgress is the polecat-prime write (real gastown: polecat_spawn.go:404 SetState(StateWorking) AFTER SetAgentState('working') -- the asymmetric write order from beads-lifecycle.kinner.json). InProgress -> Closed is the bd.Close(hookedBeadID) call from done.go:1588. Other states (Blocked, Tombstone) deferred -- this component models the happy-path lifecycle.

triples.event: feeder slings: issue gets hooked to a polecat (sling.go:918 hookBeadWithRetry)
polecat starts working: issue advances to in-progress (polecat_spawn.go:404 SetState(StateWorking))
polecat finishes (gt done): issue closes (done.go:1588 bd.Close(hookedBeadID))
